props.name: heading
props.description: The menu heading text displayed as the dropdown trigger.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon displayed before the heading text.

props.name: type
props.description: The menu style variant. Primary uses bold text, secondary uses regular weight.

props.name: version
props.description: The header version this menu is used with.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.
